description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a mix of green lawn, paved driveway, and a fenced perimeter. The structure features a flat roof, large windows, and a clean, geometric layout with a central entrance. The front yard is landscaped with several trees and shrubs, while the backyard is open and bordered by a wooden fence. The driveway leads to a garage or carport area adjacent to the main entrance. The exterior walls are finished in light tones, contrasting with the darker fencing and greenery. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, openness, and integration with the surrounding outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards, enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from the front, highlighting the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side elevation, emphasizing the length of the building, the flat roof, and the continuous wooden fence.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the bungalow from the rear, revealing the backyard, rear facade, and additional outdoor space.
description_view_3: View 3 offers the opposite side elevation, showing the driveway, garage area, and the arrangement of trees along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
